code: export let Permissao=/*#__PURE__*/function(Permissao){Permissao["ADM"]="adm";Permissao["Professor"]="professor";Permissao["Aluno"]="aluno";return Permissao;}({});export function parsePermissao(role){const r=String(role||'').trim().toLowerCase();if(r==='adm'||r==='admin')return Permissao.ADM;if(r==='professor')return Permissao.Professor;return Permissao.Aluno;}export function permissaoLabel(permissao){switch(permissao){case Permissao.ADM:return'Administrador';case Permissao.Professor:return'Professor';case Permissao.Aluno:return'Aluno';default:return'Aluno';}}
